name: AG Mortgage Investment Trust Inc. 9.500% Senior Notes due 2029
summary: AG Mortgage Investment Trust Inc. 9.500% Senior Notes due 2029 are debt securities issued by AG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. These notes represent unsecured obligations of the company and have a fixed interest rate and maturity date. AG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in a portfolio of residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS), other mortgage-related assets and commercial real estate.
